*Är du redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär och bygga framtidens integrationslösningar? Accelerate växer och vi söker integrationsutvecklare som vill vara med och skapa smarta, hållbara och effektiva IT-lösningar för våra kunder.* 




  





**Om rollen** 




 Som integrationsutvecklare hos oss blir du en del av ett starkt konsultteam som arbetar nära marknadsledande kunder. Du utvecklar robusta och långsiktiga integrationslösningar baserade på Microsoft-teknologi, både on-prem och i molnet.
 



  





 Du får arbeta i uppdrag som spänner från nyutveckling till modernisering och optimering av befintliga system. Rollen innebär nära samarbete med arkitekter, projektledare och andra specialister, där du får möjlighet att kombinera tekniskt hantverk med affärsförståelse.
 



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Vi söker dig som har några års erfarenhet av integrationsutveckling och som trivs i en konsultroll. Du har god vana av att arbeta i agila team och du är lösningsorienterad, nyfiken och tycker om att dela kunskap.
 



  





**Vi ser att du har erfarenhet av:** 



* Azure Integration Services: Logic Apps, Service Bus, Functions, API Management
* C#, .NET Core, .NET Framework
* REST-APIer, XML, JSON
* Databaser som SQL Server och Azure SQL
* Verktyg som Visual Studio/VS Code, Git, Postman och Azure DevOps



  





 Meriterande är om du arbetat med andra integrationsplattformar som BizTalk eller MuleSoft.
 



  





 Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift. För denna position krävs svenskt medborgarskap, vi utför även bakgrundskontroll av slutkandidat.
 



  





**Vi erbjuder dig** 




 Som en del av Accelerate får du inte bara spännande uppdrag, du får också en plattform för att växa. Vi satsar på utbildning, certifieringar och kontinuerligt lärande. Du blir en del av ett nätverk av erfarna konsulter som brinner för att ligga i teknikens framkant och som gärna delar med sig av kunskap.
 



  





 Hos oss får du:
 


* Kollektivavtal, friskvårdsbidrag och hälsoförsäkring
* Flexibilitet, frihet och balans mellan jobb och fritid
* En skräddarsydd utvecklings- och certifieringsplan
* En trygg och säker anställning med bra förmåner.
* Utmanande och varierande uppdrag med de senaste teknikerna



  





**Placeringsort** 




 Accelerate finns på flertal orter i Sverige & Norge. För denna roll ser vi att du utgår från vårt kontor i Stockholm, med möjlighet till hybridarbete.
 



  





**Sök till oss!** 




 Urval sker löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas före sista ansökningsdag. Önskad start är snarast eller enligt överenskommelse. Du är välkommen att kontakta Jesper Carlsson på jesper.carlsson@iver.se vid frågor eller funderingar kring tjänsten. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
 



**Välkommen till Accelerate!**

title: Forward Deployed Engineer - Sweden
description:
*To get the best candidate experience, please consider applying for a maximum of 3 roles within 12 months to ensure you are not duplicating efforts.*
 Job Category
   

  

 Sales
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

**About Salesforce**
 Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life. The world of work as we know it is changing and we're looking for Trailblazers who are passionate about bettering business and the world through AI, driving innovation, and keeping Salesforce's core values at the heart of it all.
   

  

 Ready to level-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.
   

  

 We are Salesforce, the Customer Company, inspiring the future of business with AI + Data + CRM. Leading with our core values, we help companies across every industry blaze new trails and connect with customers in a whole new way. And, we empower you to be a Trailblazer too, driving your performance and career growth, charting new paths, and improving the state of the world. If you believe in business as the greatest platform for change and in companies doing well and doing good, you've come to the right place.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Production experience required. Builder mindset non-negotiable.
   

  

 Salesforce is hiring Forward Deployed Engineers — experienced Technical Builders who design, build, and deploy agentic AI solutions directly inside enterprise customer environments. You'll work as part of a delivery team, partnering closely with a Deployment Strategist (Strategic Builder - a customer-facing advisor who shapes AI strategy and drives adoption) to co-build solutions that go live in production environments from day one. Engagements range from a single large strategic customer to multiple accounts simultaneously. The common thread is real code, real environments, and measurable business impact. This work spans configuration, customisation, and full-stack deployment — shipping solutions customers depend on.
   

  

**The Builder Experience**
* AI-Powered Development: Ship real customer solutions, supported by best-in-class AI tools — Cursor, Claude, and Salesforce coding products like Vibes — embedded into your day-to-day workflow.
* Collaborative Delivery: You'll work alongside Senior Forward Deployed Engineers and a Deployment Strategist. You'll own real components, benefit from structured mentorship from people who've shipped agentic systems at scale, and have a clear path to leading complex deliveries yourself.
* Frontier Access: Our agentic AI platform is evolving in real time. You'll work on capabilities most engineers won't touch for months — spanning Agentforce, data, platform, and headless architectures and your field insight will feed directly to the product teams building them.
* Continuous Innovation: You'll be expected to stay at the forefront, experimenting with emerging AI tools, models, and frameworks, and sharing what you learn with your team and customers.


**What You'll Actually Be Building**
* Develop AI agents and experiences that take real actions for real organisations. Our solutions are in production at some of the largest enterprises on the planet. The work matters because the customers depend on it.
* Design agent intelligence: prompts, reasoning, tool calls, and integration with customer systems, leveraging our Agentic AI platform and current LLM techniques.
* Own technical components end-to-end: from architecture choice to deployed, validated, and observable in production.
* Build and integrate data pipelines on Salesforce Data 360, Snowflake, Databricks, and customer data platforms. Model the data, ship the pipeline, validate the output
* Build and maintain agent performance dashboards and customer KPI reporting to track deployment health and business outcomes.
* Contribute to proofs-of-concept and MVPs that move from sketch to deployable in days, not months.
* Co-build alongside customers and partners, sharing best practices and enablement as you go. Leaving teams more capable after each engagement than before.
* Surface platform gaps, edge cases, and field insights to senior Engineers and the product team. Your real-world experience is the product feedback loop.
* Partner with the Deployment Strategist in your pod to translate customer business challenges into agentic solutions that actually ship.


**You're Our Forward Deployed Engineer If…**
* You have 3+ years of software engineering or technical delivery experience, with at least one production system you'd be proud to walk us through - ideally in an AI tech stack, full-stack development, or working with frontier models
* You have a degree in Computer Science or a related field
* You have prior customer-facing technical delivery experience (consulting, professional services, or forward deployed engineering) — this is a requirement, not a nice-to-have.
* You're fluent in at least one of Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, or Apex — and willing to add to that list as the work demands.
* You've been hands-on with LLMs and prompt engineering. You can explain why a prompt failed and what you'd change.
* You understand data modeling, APIs, and integration patterns deeply enough to design them, not just consume them.
* You can hold your own in a room with sales teams and customer architects.
* You ship quality code and evaluate AI outputs with engineering rigor.
* You actively tinker with the evolving AI/data landscape — piloting new tools, experimenting with new models, and staying genuinely curious about what's coming next.
* You thrive in the group chat that's building something, not just talking about it.
* You're excited to travel ~25% of the time, working directly alongside customers.


**Nice-to-Haves**
* Salesforce platform experience or certifications (Administrator, Platform Developer I, Agentforce Specialist)
* Familiarity with agent frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex) and orchestration patterns
* Hands-on with cloud data platforms (Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery)
* Experience across specialist AI delivery areas: data engineering, platform architecture, or headless deployments


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.

title: Digital Experience Designer
description:
Join the Digital Experience Design organisation, a global community of designers and researchers exploring new opportunity areas within Digital Sales experience at a leading fashion company.
 



 The assignment runs for 6 months from August 2026 to February 2027, based in Stockholm with onsite expected at least 4 days per week.
 



  





**About the assignment** 




 This role will shape how the brand builds an ongoing relationship with customers beyond moments of purchase. You will be responsible for rethinking post-purchase as a space for continuous, two-way communication that is not dependent on transactions. The work centres on how the brand shows up over time, how it listens, how it responds, and how it stays relevant without asking for immediate action.
 



  





 You will work with communication as a system rather than a set of messages, defining tone, cadence, entry points, and feedback loops that allow customers to engage on their own terms. Success in this role means creating clarity and trust through consistency, not volume. The goal is to design communication that feels purposeful, human, and worth paying attention to, and that gradually builds familiarity and loyalty through presence rather than persuasion.
 



  





 You will join the Digital Experience Design organisation, a diverse, global community of designers and researchers working across multiple Value Streams.
 



  





 You'll collaborate closely with cross-functional product teams as well as colleagues in Tech, Marketing, Brand, and Commercial functions. Your work will shape both customer-facing and colleague-facing experiences across the Brand.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Discover opportunities within the area of inverted commerce, related to agentic commerce
* Conduct user research to inform, validate, and refine hypotheses.
* Collaborate closely with the Product Manager leading this initiative, as well as other stakeholders. Also collaborate with colleagues in Post Purchase and Customer Service, as this relates to post purchase communication in a part of the customer journey owned by Customer Service.
* Present experience concepts to help the organization choose a path forward.
* Work with best practice related to both scalable and inclusive design.
* Incorporate industry and technology trends related to AI and e-commerce.



  





**About you** 



* Motivated by creating real user and business value.
* Curious, humble and knowledgeable about industry trends in digital retail and AI.
* Driven by impact, ownership, and a thriving team culture.
* Grounded in trust, psychological safety, and open communication.



  





**Experience and Skills** 



* 10+ years of experience in design and innovation for digital platforms (web, apps, internal tools) in large-scale environments
* Strong narrative and storytelling skills
* The ability to bring clarity in ambiguous situations
* A self-directed mindset with experience leading design initiatives end-to-end
* Proficiency in Figma, Miro, and PowerPoint



  





**About the assignment** 




 For this assignment you will be hired as a full-time consultant by Digitalenta. We offer our consultants a generous package including healthcare allowance, insurance policy, paid vacation days and pension savings. In addition, you'll also have a dedicated consultant manager available throughout your employment with us, in addition to optional networking activities with our network of consultants.

title: UX/UI Designer – PostNord App, Solna
description:
Vill du göra vardagen enklare för våra nordiska användare?
   

  

 Vill du designa produkter som används av miljontals människor varje månad – och göra vardagen lite enklare för kunder i hela Norden?
   

  

 Vi söker nu en UX/UI Designer till vårt Consumer Apps‑team, med fokus på PostNord Appen som idag används brett i Sverige, Danmark och Finland - och snart även i Norge. Här får du arbeta med en produkt där varje detalj du designar gör skillnad.
   

  

 Som UX/UI Designer hos oss arbetar du hands-on genom hela designprocessen - från att förstå problem och användarbehov till att ta fram lösningar som implementeras i produkten.
   

  

 Rollen har en tydlig tyngd på UI och visuellt hantverk. Samtidigt handlar arbetet mycket om att navigera komplexitet – förstå affärsregler, samordna med stakeholders och driva initiativ framåt i organisationen.
   

  

**Du Kommer**
* Ta del av ägandeskap för design av konkreta flows, funktioner och gränssnitt
* Skapa wireframes, interaktionsdesign, prototyper och färdig UI
* Säkerställa hög kvalitet, tillgänglighet och konsistens i leveranser
* Arbeta nära utvecklare för att säkerställa att design är genomförbar
* Kollaborera med produktägare och stakeholders för att driva lösningar framåt
* Du blir en viktig del i att realisera och vidareutveckla designarbetet tillsammans med UX Lead.


**Vi Tror Att Du**
* Har erfarenhet av att designa digitala produkter för native appar (UX/UI)
* Är trygg i att arbeta självständigt, men också öppen för feedback och vägledning
* Har ett starkt öga för UI, detaljer och visuellt hantverk
* Har djup kunskap i Figma (inkl. komponenter, variabler eller liknande arbetssätt)
* Förstår hur man designar robusta flöden med olika states och edge cases
* Har god förståelse för både UX och UI – och hur de samverkar i praktiken
* Har erfarenhet av att arbeta nära utvecklare och navigera tekniska begränsningar
* Har kunskap om WCAG och tillgänglighet
* Är självgående och driver arbete framåt i en komplex miljö
* Är stark i stakeholder management och kommunikation


 Vi lägger stor vikt vid inställning och arbetssätt. Vi tror att du gillar att lösa problem, samarbeta och ta dig an komplexa utmaningar – snarare än att enbart fokusera på “nya features” eller stora redesigns.
   

  

**Extra Viktigt i Rollen**
* Förståelse för plattformsspecifika designprinciper (iOS / Android) och deras begränsningar
* Förmåga att motivera designbeslut utifrån dessa principer
* Erfarenhet av designsystem – du behöver inte äga ett, men ska kunna arbeta och bidra i ett
* Förmåga att skapa och arbeta med komponenter och strukturer i större skalor


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av större organisationer eller komplexa produktmiljöer
* Erfarenhet av mobilappar med hög användarvolym
* Intresse för hur AI kan användas för att effektivisera design- eller arbetsflöden
* Erfarenhet av verktyg/arbetsflöden som Jira, design tokens eller liknande


**Vad Du Kan Förvänta Dig**
* Arbeta med en produkt med miljontals användare i Norden
* Vara en del av ett team där design spelar en viktig roll i produktutvecklingen
* Samarbeta tätt med utveckling och produkt i vardagen
* Möjlighet att påverka både detaljer och helhetsupplevelse


**Vi gör vardagen enklare**
 PostNord är den ledande leverantören av kommunikations- och logistiklösningar till, från och inom Norden. Vi säkerställer postservicen till privatpersoner och företag i Sverige och Danmark. Vi strävar efter att göra vardagen enklare och mer hållbar för alla som bor och arbetar i Norden. Vi är ansvarstagande, modiga och engagerade, och leder effektivt förändring oavsett om vi leder oss själva eller andra. Vi uppmuntrar lagarbete, uppriktighet och positiva relationer på arbetsplatsen. Vi bygger vidare på våra framgångar och lär oss av både kollegor och misstag. Människor med olika bakgrund arbetar hos oss. Du kommer därför vara en del av en arbetsplats med stor mångfald, vilket bidrar till bättre resultat för verksamheten. Besök oss på www.postnord.com.
   

  

**Ansök**
 Vad väntar du på? Välkommen med din ansökan! Urval sker löpande, men på grund av semestertider kan återkoppling komma att dröja något – vi planerar att tidigast återkomma som
 **tidigast i mitten på augusti.**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Web Platform Lead
description:
Saab is on an important journey.
   

  

*As the world changes, the relevance of what we do is becoming even clearer. Demand is growing. Expectations are rising. The need for trust, clarity and strong positioning across markets has never been greater.*
*That is why we are building a marketing and communications team worthy of the journey Saab is on.*
 We are now looking for a Web Platform Lead to help build, govern and continuously improve Saab.com, our CMS environment and the related digital services that support Saab’s external digital presence.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who wants real ownership. Someone who can bring structure to complexity, connect business and communication needs to web platform priorities, and make sure our external web presence is stable, secure, compliant, user-focused and aligned with Saab’s brand and business direction.
   

  

 Your role
   

  

 As Web Platform Lead, you will be responsible for the governance, development, operation and continuous improvement of Saab.com, our CMS environment and the related digital services that support Saab’s external digital presence.
   

  

 You will own and coordinate the roadmap, backlog, governance model and day-to-day operations of Saab’s CMS platform, Optimizely, together with related services and suppliers. You will act as the main link between Group Brand & Marketing, Group IT, external partners and internal stakeholders.
   

  

 You need to understand technical dependencies well enough to ask the right questions, coordinate development needs and translate business, communication and brand requirements into clear platform priorities.
   

  

 It is a broad role. You will work across technology, communication, content, brand, security, compliance, suppliers and internal governance. You will need to create clarity where there is complexity, build structure where there is fragmentation and make sure the work moves forward in a way that is both practical and sustainable.
   

  

 You will report to the Vice President, Global Head of Brand & Marketing and be part of Saab’s Group Brand & Marketing team. You will work closely with colleagues in Sweden and across the organisation, spanning brand strategy, editorial, digital, events, communications, IT and business stakeholders.
   

  

 At Group level, we are building stronger platforms, clearer frameworks and a more connected way of working across brand, marketing and communications. This role is key to making that work real in our digital environment.
   

  

 We are moving fast. You need to want to move with us.
   

  

 What you will do
   

  

* own and coordinate the governance, development and operation of Saab.com and Saab’s CMS platform, Optimizely
* manage the web platform roadmap and backlog in an agile or semi-agile way
* create clarity around priorities, dependencies, timelines, decisions and responsibilities
* act as the main point of coordination for platform operations, support and incident management
* work closely with Group IT, suppliers and internal stakeholders to ensure that issues are handled efficiently and risks are escalated when needed
* represent Group Brand & Marketing and Group Communication & Sustainability in relevant IT governance forums and digital projects
* support budget planning, cost follow-up, supplier coordination and approval processes connected to the web platform, domain management and related digital services
* maintain clear documentation of platform architecture, processes, access rights, suppliers, decisions, risks and key stakeholders
* contribute to the continuous improvement of Saab’s external web presence and other prioritised digital brand touchpoints
* help improve structure, user flows, content coordination, testing and optimisation together with content owners, UX, developers, agencies and other stakeholders
* follow how AI-driven tools and automation are reshaping web platform management, content workflows, search, discovery and web experience, and help evaluate relevant opportunities for Saab


 Your Profile
   

  

 You know how to operate in the space between technology, communication and business needs. You are structured enough to bring order to complex systems, but pragmatic enough to keep work moving.
   

  

 You can hold your own in a discussion about governance, priorities, platform dependencies or supplier delivery, and you can still roll up your sleeves to clarify a requirement, improve a process, document a decision or push an issue over the line.
   

  

 You are comfortable in complex, matrixed environments and know how to build trust, alignment and momentum across functions, suppliers and seniority levels.
   

  

 You are service-minded, but you understand that strong platform ownership sometimes means saying no, challenging unclear requests, protecting stability and security, and helping the organisation make better decisions.
   

  

 Most of all, you are energised by building. You do not need a finished playbook to do good work. You are excited by the opportunity to help shape it.
   

  

 What you bring
   

  

* experience from web platform ownership, web management, digital product ownership, IT coordination or a similar role in a complex organisation
* strong understanding of CMS platforms, preferably Optimizely
* experience managing digital roadmaps, backlogs, priorities and dependencies
* understanding of IT governance, support models and incident management
* experience coordinating suppliers, developers and internal stakeholders
* the ability to translate business and communication needs into clear platform requirements
* strong documentation, governance and process skills
* the ability to manage complexity, prioritise and create structure
* strong stakeholder management and communication skills
* understanding of security, compliance, access management and data/privacy considerations
* experience working in agile or semi-agile digital development environments
* excellent verbal and written communication skills in English


 Experience from UX, web production, CMS publishing, accessibility, SEO, analytics, content structure, information architecture or digital optimisation is a strong advantage. Familiarity with AI-powered tools for content, SEO, analytics, search, discovery or platform optimisation is also considered a merit.
   

  

 Experience from large, decentralised or regulated organisations is also considered a merit.
   

  

 This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection. For positions requiring security clearance additional obligations on citizenship may apply.
   

  

 What you will be part of
   

  

 Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.
   

  

 Saab is a leading defence and security company with an enduring mission, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 28,000 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.
   

  

 Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defence capability of several nations. Read more about us here.

title: AI Engineer
description:
Join our innovative team at Curamando as an
 **AI Engineer** 
 ! Work with cutting-edge technologies, mentor others, and help shape the future of our growing AI practice in a collaborative, inclusive environment.
   

  

 At Curamando, we're not just creating software; we're crafting the future, one innovative project at a time. We empower our team to not only envision the future but also play a pivotal role in building it.
   

  

 Curamando, part of the Nordic consulting house Eidra, specialises in accelerating top-line growth through digital strategy and innovation. We're a fast-growing consultancy already partnering with industry leaders — from cutting-edge automotive brands to forward-looking tech companies. Together with Eidra's 1,200+ strategists, creatives, and engineers spread across Stockholm, New York, and beyond, we tackle ambitious problems at scale. This role isn't only about delivering on Curamando's value offering — you'll also play an integral part in helping other Eidra verticals deliver on their AI agenda, well beyond commerce.
   

  

 We're looking for people ready to join us on this journey, bringing passion, creativity, and dedication. This role is open across multiple levels — from individual contributors to senior engineers and emerging leaders — and offers an opportunity to develop your craft while working closely with clients on real-world AI challenges.
   

  

 Job Summary:
   

  

 We are seeking AI Engineers with experience in building robust, scalable, AI-powered solutions. The ideal candidate combines a product engineering mindset with deep enthusiasm for advancing AI capabilities, a strong interest in knowledge sharing and mentoring, and a genuine curiosity about how to build value offerings on the cutting edge of AI.
   

  

 For more senior candidates, we're particularly interested in people with an intrapreneurial and business development mindset - engineers who want to help grow our AI Core team from a 15–20 person operation to 40+, and who see themselves as builders of the company, not just of the deliverables.
   

  

 As an AI Engineer at Curamando, your role will involve:
   

  

* Helping clients clarify their questions and determining whether AI is a suitable solution
* Understanding the limitations of models and how to address them within a product's UX
* Architecting agentic solutions (context, memory, and tool/skill handling) and implementing them using frameworks such as Mastra, Microsoft Agent Framework, LangChain/LangGraph
* Applying stochastic test casing and trace-based reasoning to evaluate, test, and improve agent behaviour, supported by observability tooling (Langfuse, Promptfoo, etc.)
* Understanding and applying core AI concepts such as redlining, document chunking for accuracy, efficient use of embeddings, and debugging AI systems
* Validating, deploying, monitoring, and maintaining models, ensuring they can be used at scale
* Developing and maintaining end-to-end data pipelines and ML workflows, optimising for performance and reliability
* Working with diverse, cross-functional teams across Curamando and Eidra on projects that deliver groundbreaking AI solutions


 For senior candidates and emerging leaders, the role also includes:
   

  

* Mentoring and inspiring: Nurturing a growing team of AI engineers, fostering a culture of continuous learning, knowledge sharing, and collaborative problem-solving - essential in a field that moves this fast
* Building the practice: Contributing to how we shape our AI value offering, identifying new opportunities, and helping evolve the AI Core team as it scales
* Cross-vertical impact: Partnering with other Eidra companies to bring AI capability to domains beyond Curamando's core focus


 We also welcome experienced software engineers looking to transition into AI:
   

  

* Strong product development background with several years of software engineering experience
* Active engagement in AI (agents, wrappers, context engineering)
* Comfortable working in a product/engineering team


 Who You Are:
   

  

 We value candidates who demonstrate:
   

  

* Great delivery skills: Proven capability to deliver AI solutions
* Strong AI intuition: A deep understanding of AI concepts
* A people mindset: Genuine interest in knowledge sharing, mentoring, and lifting those around you
* Curiosity: Enthusiasm for emerging technologies, creativity in problem-solving, and eagerness to learn in a rapidly evolving AI landscape
* Full-stack product thinking: Frontend or backend experience outside the traditional AI field, with the ability to build end-to-end
* An intrapreneurial spirit (especially for senior roles): Interest in helping build the company, not just deliver to clients - finding your path in our career framework means being curious about the business too
* A passion for innovation and a knack for problem-solving
* Eagerness to learn, grow, and take on new challenges
* Belief in collaboration, diversity, and making a significant impact


 What We Offer:
   

  

* A chance to work closely with global brands on diverse projects that push the boundaries of what's possible - across Curamando and the wider Eidra group.
* A fun and fair work environment where you can expand your skills through unique challenges and fantastic colleagues.
* A personal coach, and a setting where you can grow professionally and personally.
* Being part of multidisciplinary teams in a highly ambitious setting.
* The opportunity to shape how our AI practice evolves and scales.


 Why Curamando?
   

  

 Career Framework: We believe in fairness and clarity, which is why we've established a transparent career framework to ensure equal pay and equal opportunities for all. Together with your coach, you'll build your own development plan and grow in your career.
   

  

 Work-Life Balance: At Curamando, diversity is our strength. We've cultivated an environment that supports an excellent work-life balance and welcomes team members from all walks of life.
   

  

 Innovations and Learning: Technology is always evolving. Our developers work closely with designers, analysts, testers and more — sharing knowledge and growing together.
   

  

 Skills Over Degrees: We're more interested in what you can do than in the diplomas you hold. Talent, drive, and creativity are what count at Curamando.
   

  

**About Curamando**
 Curamando, part of the Nordic consulting house Eidra, specialises in accelerating top-line growth through digital strategy and innovation. We're a fast-growing consultancy already partnering with industry leaders - from cutting-edge automotive brands to forward-looking tech companies. Together with Eidra's 1,200+ strategists, creatives, and engineers across Stockholm, New York, and beyond, we tackle ambitious problems at scale.
   

  

 Curamando offers tailored consulting services with the best people and assets to help clients build competitive digital marketing and sales capabilities to reach their business goals. We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.
   

  

 Curamando offers tailored consulting services with the best people and assets to help clients build competitive digital marketing and sales capabilities to reach their business goals.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: QA Engineer  with Payments
description:
Purview is a global leader in IT-Engineering and Talent Solutions, trusted by Fortune 500 and mid-market clients across 21+ countries. Headquartered in Edinburgh, with delivery centres in India, our 1,200+ professionals drive meaningful digital transformation worldwide.
 



 As a certified Ethnic Minority Business and Premier Member of MSDUK, we proudly blend diversity with deep technical expertise to deliver results that matter.
 



 We’re currently hiring for the below role with one of our valued clients. If it aligns with your experience and aspirations, we’d love to hear from you!
 



  





**Role :QA Engineer with Payments** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden** 




**Job Type: Contractual Position** 




  





**Job Description:** 




 Digital Lending consists of several cross-functional agile teams that design, build and maintain Lending products in digital customer channels (internet bank, mobile bank).
 



 Digital Lending will augment the current teams with 8 new FTCs in different roles. To have the right balance between different roles and competencies we need 2 Quality Assurance engineers.
 



 Location can be either Vilnius in Lithuania or Stockholm in Sweden. 3 days per week is expected that consultant will work from our office.
 



**Main responsibilities:** 



* Collaborate with product manager, business analysts, UX designers, developers within agile teams to understand requirements and define test strategies
* Develop comprehensive test plans, test cases, and required testing documentation
* Execute manual tests to ensure product quality
* Identify, document, track, and resolve defects effectively
* Participate in sprint planning, stand-ups, retrospectives, and other agile ceremonies



**Requirements:** 



* A relevant academic degree or equivalent work experience within IT
* 4+ years of experience as a Quality Assurance Engineer or similar role, preferably within the banking or financial services sector
* Experience with testing web applications and/or mobile app testing
* Strong understanding of QA methodologies, tools, processes, and best practices
* Previous experience working in agile development environments and familiarity with agile methodologies such as Scrum, Kanban, SAFe
* Excellent problem-solving skills to investigate issues and provide effective solutions quickly
* Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams including developers, business analysts, UX designers, product manager
* Keen attention to detail ensuring thorough testing coverage across all features of lending products
* Knowledge of banking products and lending processes is considered as a big advantage
* ISTQB Certified Tester Foundation Level or similar certification is considered as an advantage.

title: Data Analyst (On-site in Dubai)
description:
**Join the pioneer tribe. AI-First since December 2023.** 




  





**Position:** 
 Data Analyst (A/B Testing & Experimentation)
 



**Total Annual Package: Up to AED 348,000 (Tax-Free) +** 
 comprehensive benefits
 



 • Base: AED 20,000 – 25,000/month (AED 240,000 – 300,000/year)
 



 • Performance bonus: up to 10% of base, paid monthly
 



**Location:** 
 Dubai, UAE (On-site) with relocation assistance and visa support
 



  





**About the Role:** 




 If you spend your days running A/B tests, analyzing conversion funnels, and digging into why users drop off before checkout — and you write your own SQL and Python to get those answers — this role is built for you. General analysts and program managers without hands-on technical and experimentation skills won't be a fit.
 



  





 You'll own Puffy's experimentation program from hypothesis to business recommendation. You pull data from Shopify, GA4, Google Ads, and BigQuery yourself. You design the test, run the statistical analysis, and tell the business what to change and why. Every recommendation you deliver has to be clear enough that marketing, UX, and development can act on it the same week.
 



  





**The Career Accelerator:** 




 Puffy runs a high volume of experiments across a $1B+ e-commerce platform. You'll be involved in more A/B tests, conversion analyses, and data pipeline builds in your first year than most analysts see in three. You'll work across departments — marketing, UX, development, operations — which means broader context and faster pattern recognition. The pace is demanding, and it rewards people who are genuinely curious and want to sharpen their craft quickly.
 



  





**What Is In It For You:** 




 This isn't just another analytics role. This is your chance to become a true industry architect.
 



  





**1. Own the Full Experimentation Cycle — Not Just the Dashboard.** 
 Most data analysts inherit someone else's reporting setup and maintain it. Here, you own hypothesis generation, test design, statistical analysis, and the business recommendation that follows. You build your own pipelines across Shopify, GA4, Google Ads, and BigQuery — no waiting in a queue for data, no presenting metrics without a point of view. You still report to the manager, but the experimentation output is yours to drive. Within 12 months, you'll have more hands-on testing reps than analysts accumulate in three years elsewhere.
 



**2. Join the Elite Organization and Partner with the 1%:** 



1. 🏆 Top 5 Mattress Brand in the USA with Over $1 Billion USD in Sales
2. 🌍 Great Place to Work Certified
3. 💡 Work with Forbes Council Member CEO Gain firsthand exposure to strategic decisions and high-velocity execution that drives a global brand.



**3. Experience a World-Class Lifestyle.** 
 Dubai offers a tax-free salary, world-class infrastructure, year-round sunshine, and a global lifestyle that most professionals only experience later in their careers. Your entire compensation package lands in your account — no deductions, no surprises.
 



**4. Become the Person Who Knows Why Things Convert.** 
 In most companies, analysts report numbers. Here, you're the person who tells the business what to change and why. When a test wins or loses, your analysis is the reason leadership moves. You'll build the instinct to separate signal from noise across segments, devices, and traffic sources — and the communication skills to make non-technical stakeholders act on what you find.
 



  





**What You'll Need:** 



1. 3+ years in data analysis, experimentation, or CRO within e-commerce, D2C, or any high-traffic transactional website (fintech, marketplaces, SaaS, banking)
2. Strong SQL — complex joins, window functions, CTEs across large datasets without relying on pre-built dashboards
3. Working Python (or R) for data manipulation, statistical analysis, and automation
4. Proven A/B testing experience — hypothesis design through statistical analysis to business recommendation; solid grasp of sample sizing, significance thresholds, and common pitfalls
5. Hands-on GA4 experience — event-based tracking, custom explorations, and the ability to tie GA4 data to other sources
6. Experience integrating ad platform data (Google Ads, Meta) with site analytics to see the full acquisition-to-conversion funnel
7. Ability to independently connect to and pull from multiple data sources (APIs, warehouses, flat files) without engineering support
8. Sharp analytical communication — complex findings distilled into concise recommendations for non-technical stakeholders
9. Proactive and curious — you spot testing opportunities and chase root causes before anyone asks



  





**Good-to-Have:** 



1. Experience with BigQuery or AWS data warehousing, including scheduled queries and data modeling
2. Familiarity with session replay and heatmap tools (FullStory, Hotjar) for qualitative behavioral analysis
3. Background in Looker, Tableau, or similar dashboarding tools



  





**The Puffy DNA:** 




 We're restless, perpetually hungry, and fast-paced, driven by an unwavering belief that we can outperform any competitor — regardless of their size.
 


1. **Be the Owner:** 
 We don't hire employees; we welcome owners. You're accountable for results, not activity.
2. **Execute with Urgency:** 
 We thrive in high-stakes environments by making thoughtful decisions quickly and acting decisively.
3. **Demand Excellence:** 
 We solve the hard problems that others can't, pushing the boundaries of our craft.
4. **Be AI-First:** 
 Daily multi-turn AI conversations challenge your assumptions.
5. **Go All-In:** 
 When the mission demands it, we rally as one team to cross the finish line.



  





**✨ Your Total Compensation & Benefits:** 




  





 💰
 **Compensation:** 



1. Monthly performance bonuses (up to 10%)
2. Tax-free income
3. Annual return flight allowance to your home country
4. Parking allowance (up to AED 7,800 annually)



  





 🏥
 **Health & Protection:** 



1. Premium worldwide health coverage (upto AED 1Million)
2. Life insurance & Personal Accident Insurance (24x monthly salary)



  





**🌴 Time Off:** 



1. 22 working days annual leave + UAE public holidays



  





**🌍 Relocation Support (International Hires):** 



1. UAE work visa sponsorship
2. International flights & airport transfers
3. 14-day 4-star hotel accommodation



  





**💼 Work Environment:** 



1. AI First organization with access to AI-native tool stack
2. Premium office environment in Dubai Internet City
3. Learning & development opportunities
4. International team collaboration (14+ nationalities)



  





**🏆 Rewards & Recognition:** 



1. Eligibility for selection to the Leaders Club — an elite recognition program featuring premium wellness memberships, exclusive networking with senior leadership, and annual leadership retreats
2. Eligibility for nomination as 'We Are' Champion of the Month — monthly recognition with gift vouchers and company-wide celebration for exceptional contributions



  





**✅ Other Benefits:** 



1. End of Service Gratuity per UAE law



  





 The alternative is another year where your potential is capped and your best hypotheses die in a backlog no one reads.
 



  





**Ready to Shape Your Story?** 
 Click "Apply" and take the first step.

title: Senior Product Manager, Subscriptions Mission
description:
**Mission Statement**
 The Subscriptions Mission builds and evolves Spotify's subscription products and marketplace experiences to drive sustainable user and revenue growth globally. We focus on awareness, acquisition, activation, retention, and monetization strategies that help users unlock the full value of Spotify while enabling the business to scale efficiently and responsibly.
   

  

**About The Team**
 This role sits at the heart of the Subscriptions Mission and owns how users move through the freemium funnel — from the moment a free user encounters Premium value, through trial, conversion, activation, and into long-term retention. You’ll partner closely with product, design, marketing, finance, pricing & packaging, and regional commercial teams to shape the end-to-end subscriber journey across plans and markets.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Own the product strategy and roadmap for the freemium-to-Premium funnel, improving conversion, trial-to-paid, ARPU, and long-term retention
* Shape subscription plans and portfolio in partnership with Pricing & Packaging, including tiers, durations, and regional pricing strategies
* Lead discovery, design, and delivery of subscriber-facing features from concept through global rollout
* Run lifecycle and monetization experiments across trials, win-back, upgrades, payment recovery, and retention flows
* Translate behavioral and revenue data into hypotheses, define success metrics, and drive a prioritized experimentation roadmap
* Design and evaluate A/B experiments, scaling solutions that deliver measurable impact
* Balance trade-offs across user value, revenue impact, and operational complexity
* Partner with Finance, BizOps, and regional teams to localize plans, offers, and messaging
* Communicate strategy, results, and trade-offs clearly to senior stakeholders


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have 5+ years of product management experience delivering customer-facing products at scale
* You have strong experience working with subscription or monetization models
* You think in funnels and cohorts, connecting product decisions to business outcomes like retention and revenue
* You are comfortable designing and interpreting experiments and using data to guide decisions
* You have experience working across global markets and understand how to balance consistency with localization
* You bring strong judgment when making product and prioritization trade-offs
* You communicate clearly and collaborate effectively across cross-functional teams
* You are curious, adaptable, and comfortable working in ambiguous environments


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London, United Kingdom or Stockholm, Sweden
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home


**Our Global Benefits**
* Extensive learning opportunities, through our dedicated team, GreenHouse.
* Flexible share incentives letting you choose how you share in our success.
* Global parental leave, six months off - for all new parents.
* All The Feels, our employee assistance program and self-care hub.
* Flexible public holidays, swap days off according to your values and beliefs.

title: Process Lead – Contingent Workforce Management
description:
*Saab is a place where teamwork makes things fly. Literally. Join us and experience our supportive and friendly workplace.*
 Your role
   

  

 We are seeking a dedicated and experienced Process Owner for Contingent Workforce Management to lead and optimise the end-to-end process for managing contingent labour at Saab Group. The role sits within the HR function with a strong cross-functional mandate, working closely with Procurement, IT, Finance, and Security.
   

  

 This is a strategic and operational role at the intersection of these functions, requiring close collaboration to ensure a seamless and effective process across the organisation. You will have a clear mandate to define, drive, and continuously improve the process — and as we implement a Vendor Management System (VMS), you will be pivotal in ensuring it is harmonised, scalable, and compliant, while also acting as a key change leader, engaging stakeholders and driving adoption across the business.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Own and govern the contingent workforce process from requisition to offboarding
* Define, document, and maintain process standards and workflows
* Coordinate cross-functional collaboration between HR, Procurement, Security, Finance, and IT
* Lead process improvement and digitalisation initiatives, including VMS implementation
* Monitor KPIs and ensure process efficiency, compliance, and risk mitigation
* Act as the single point of contact for all matters related to contingent workforce processes
* Deliver training and communication to stakeholders to drive adoption and compliance
* Engage with internal and external stakeholders to ensure a seamless user experience


 We offer a central and strategic role in a high-impact transformation, where you will have the opportunity to shape and lead our global contingent workforce process. Join a dynamic and growing procurement organisation that fosters cross-functional collaboration across global teams. Additionally, you will have access to professional development and career progression opportunities to help you grow both personally and professionally.
   

  

 Your profile
   

  

 We are looking for someone with strong analytical, communication and stakeholder management skills. You’re a collaborative team player who easily engages others and builds trust across the organisation. With a clear and inclusive way of working, you lead work forward, bring structure to complex processes and help shape effective ways of working.
   

  

**Requirements:**
* 5+ years of experience in contingent workforce management, gained within HR, Procurement, Operations, or a related field
* Proven experience leading or managing cross-functional processes in a complex organisation
* Familiarity with contingent labour regulations and internal controls
* Experience with Vendor Management Systems
* Fluent communicator in both spoken and written English and Swedish


*This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection. For positions requiring security clearance additional obligations on citizenship may apply.*
 What you will be part of
   

  

 Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.
   

  

 Saab is a leading defence and security company with an enduring mission, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 26,100 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.
   

  

 Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defence capability of several nations. Read more about us here
   

  

*Kindly observe that this is an ongoing recruitment process and that the position might be filled before the closing date of the advertisement.*

title: Staff / Principal Design Engineer
description:
**TL;DR** 
 - We're seeking exceptional experienced Design Engineers who combine strong frontend engineering fundamentals with a sharp eye for craft and interaction design. You’ll work closely with both design and engineering to build world-class interfaces that empower the next generation of creators and builders.
   

  

 Why Lovable?
   

  

 Lovable lets anyone build software with plain English. Solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We’re at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, solve complex problems, and bring their dreams to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value high ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek people who care deeply, challenge us, and are driven to build something of lasting impact.
   

  

 What we’re looking for
   

  

* 10+ years of experience, shipping products users genuinely love
* Portfolio demonstrating sophisticated interactions and thoughtful user affordances required (if you don’t have a portfolio - please check out our other roles!)
* Ability to make smart trade-offs between speed and polish, knowing when to ship and when to refine
* Strong fundamental understanding of modern frontend systems - React architecture, state management, performance, accessibility, and scalable UI patterns. If your strengths lean more visual than technical, check out our Product Designer roles instead.
* Experience translating scrappy explorations into production-ready experiences
* Strong product sense with an eye for detail, accessibility, and usability


 What you’ll do
   

  

 In one sentence: Own and scale the user-facing experience of Lovable products, turning powerful capabilities into intuitive, magical interfaces.
   

  

* Design and build world class product experiences
* Drive front-end execution - pioneering new interaction patterns, micro-animations, and delightful details that elevate the entire experience
* Implement features in React/TypeScript with obsessive attention to detail
* Collaborate with backend, ML, design, and product teams to bring complex features to life in a seamless way
* Explore and iterate on visual designs with designers, translating explorations into scalable, web-native implementations
* Build and maintain reusable components that enhance consistency while enabling creativity across the product
* Re-invent how modern teams work


 Our tech stack
   

  

 We're building with tools that both humans and AI love:
   

  

* Frontend: React, Tailwind
* Backend: Golang and Rust
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Many LLM providers
* DevOps & Tooling: Github Actions, Grafana, OTEL, infra-as-code (Terraform)


 And always on the lookout for what's next!
   

  

 How we hire
   

  

* Fill in a short form then jump on an intro call with our design team.
* Show us some of your work you’re really proud of.
* Show us how you approach problems during several technical interviews, including a technical screening where we evaluate frontend engineering fundamentals at the same level we expect from Product Engineers.
* In some cases, we may opt to do paid, trial work.


**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English - it’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal

title: Product Designer - Womenswear Knitwear
description:
**Job Description**

*Design isn’t just what we do—it’s who we are. At & Other Stories, you’ll create collections that set trends and tell stories. From first sketch to final garment, your vision will shape the future of fashion and inspire a global audience.*




 As a Product Designer in Knitwear, you will transform creative concepts into outstanding products that align with our brand identity and meet customer expectations. You’ll combine design expertise with technical knowledge to deliver collections that are both innovative and commercially relevant.
   

  





**Your Responsibilities:**




 What you will do…
   

  




* Design and develop products for seasonal collections, ensuring alignment with brand DNA and creative vision
* Translate trends into key silhouettes, fabrics, colours, and details
* Identify yarns, colours, silhouettes and details that are in line with set seasonal trend and design direction. Plan a coordinated assortment with focus on new, relevant and commercial products
* Participate in fittings and ensure garments meet our high standards of silhouette and design with the right timing, following up closely throughout the development process
* Conduct ongoing research and analysis of fashion trends, customer behaviour, and market movements
* Take ownership of timelines and drive the design process forward with initiative and creativity
* Contribute to assortment creation and curation, ensuring collections are commercially viable and aligned with growth and profitability goals.
* Collaborate closely with design leads, print, buyer, and production teams to deliver cohesive collections.
* Provide informal leadership, leading and developing Junior Designers. Confidently communicate your design and product presentation in a clear, compelling, and inspiring way



**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH**




 You will collaborate daily with Designers, Product Developers, Atelier Designers and the wider Assortment and Buying teams. You’ll be part of a design team of around 15 within a broader group of approximately 25 colleagues, working closely to shape a cohesive knitwear offer.
   

  





 In this collaborative environment, you’ll share ideas, build on team expertise and work with internal partners and external suppliers to develop high-quality, commercially relevant products from concept through to final delivery.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

**WHO YOU ARE**




 We are looking for people with…
   

  




* Degree in Fashion Design or a related field
* Proven experience in knitwear design within a fashion retail environment
* Strong technical knowledge of knitwear construction, including yarns, gauges, and knitting techniques (e.g. fully fashioned, circular knit, jacquard)
* Solid understanding of garment construction, materials, and product development processes
* Experience in building and developing commercial assortments in line with brand direction
* Strong ability to research, interpret, and apply trends within a retail context
* High level of design sensibility aligned with brand aesthetics
* Proficiency in design software (Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop)
* Confident in working cross-functionally with buying, production, and suppliers
* Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus



  

  

 And people who are…
   

  




* Creative and detail-oriented with a passion for fashion.
* Visionary and curious – eager to push boundaries and explore new ideas.
* Communicative and collaborative – building alignment across teams.
* Resilient and adaptable – thriving in a fast-paced environment with tight timelines.
* Open to feedback and innovation, with a strong focus on sustainability and commercial impact.


**Additional Information**

 This is a full-time permanent position based at our Head Office in Stockholm.
   

  





 If you feel this opportunity is exciting feel free to apply by sending in your
 **CV and Portfolio in English** 
 before 7th August. Due to data policies, we only accept applications through our career page.
   

  





**Please note that we may take the ad down before the application deadline if we receive a high volume of qualified applications—so we encourage you to apply early.**




 We value collaboration and believe great ideas thrive when we work closely together. Therefore, this role is primarily office based, with four days per week on site. One day per week, you may work remotely.
   

  





 Please note that this position is offered on a local contract, and you must have the legal right to work in Sweden before applying.
   

  





  

  





**WHO WE ARE**




**& Other Stories** 
 is a modern fashion brand that tells expressive stories. Designed for everyday living – with its excitement, curiosity and imperfections – our clothes empower those who think differently. Learn more about & Other Stories here.
   

  

  

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE**




 We offer all our employees attractive benefits with broad development opportunities. All our employees receive a staff discount usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
   

  





 In addition to this, & Other Stories-based colleagues also receive:
   

  




* 30 days holiday
* A collective agreement which includes pension and life insurance
* Wellness benefit 4000kr/year
* Benify Benefits Portal



**JOIN US**




 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.
   

  





 We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.
   

  





 We look forward to hearing from you

title: H&M - Denim Designer - Womenswear
description:
**Job Description**

 Join H&M and shape the future of womenswear denim.
   

  





 We're looking for a visionary Denim Designer with a strong creative point of view, exceptional product knowledge, and an instinct for what's next. In this role, you'll create collections that define the balance between timeless denim essentials and fashion-forward statement pieces, translating emerging trends into desirable products for millions of customers around the world.
   

  





 Working at the heart of our Womenswear Denim team, you'll drive the creative development of silhouettes, fits, washes, fabric innovations, and finishes, building collections that are both trend-relevant and commercially impactful. From concept to final product, you'll collaborate closely with Product Developers, Planners, and global suppliers to bring modern denim stories to life at scale.
   

  





 We're looking for a designer who lives and breathes denim—someone with a sharp fashion eye, a deep understanding of construction and craftsmanship, and the confidence to challenge conventions while delivering for a global customer. You'll thrive in a fast-moving, close-to-season environment, combining creativity with commercial awareness to create products that inspire.
   

  





**What you'll bring**



* BA/MA in Fashion or Textile Design, or equivalent experience
* At least 3 years' experience designing denim within womenswear
* Deep expertise in denim fabrics, garment construction, washes, finishes, and fit development
* Experience from an aspirational international fashion brand or retailer
* International experience is an advantage
* A strong understanding of current and emerging denim trends, with the ability to translate inspiration into commercially relevant collections
* A customer-first mindset and passion for creating fashion for H&M's global womenswear customer
* Experience collaborating with suppliers, laundries, and manufacturing partners across Asia and Europe
* Advanced skills in Adobe Creative Suite; experience with CLO 3D is a plus
* Strong communication and collaboration skills with the ability to inspire and influence cross-functional teams
* A proactive, solution-oriented mindset with natural ownership and leadership qualities
* Excellent organizational skills, able to manage multiple priorities and timelines
* Adaptability and energy to succeed in a fast-paced, ever-evolving fashion environment
* Fluent English; Swedish is not required



**Additional Information**




 This role is based in Stockholm and reports to the Assortment Manager. You'll join a passionate team of Designers, Product Developers, and Planners who are driven by creativity, innovation, and a shared ambition to shape the future of fashion.
   

  





 If this sounds like you, we'd love to see your application. Please submit your CV along with a portfolio (PDF, maximum 10MB) showcasing your creative vision, mood boards, design process, fit and wash developments, fabric innovation, and final collections. We encourage you to include work that reflects the aspirational H&M Womenswear customer and demonstrates both your creative thinking and commercial understanding. All application materials should be submitted in English.
   

  





 At H&M Group, you'll enjoy attractive benefits, global career opportunities, and a staff discount across all H&M Group brands—including H&M, COS, ARKET, & Other Stories, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, and Afound. You'll also be part of our H&M Incentive Program (HIP), rewarding our shared success.
   

  





 At H&M, we're committed to creating an inclusive recruitment process. To help ensure fair and unbiased hiring, we kindly ask that you do not include a cover letter with your application.
   

  





 Shape the next generation of denim.
   

  





 At H&M, fashion is constantly evolving—and so are we. From elevated wardrobe icons to trend-defining fashion moments, we create accessible design with global impact. If you're passionate about pushing denim forward and creating collections that inspire customers around the world, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Game Lead - Flappy Dunk
description:
**About Voodoo**
 Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Paper.io 2, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.
   

  

 This role is
 **full remote** 
 within CET ±3h.
   

  

 Team
   

  

 Our Gaming team is made up of hybrid-casual, casual and mid-core experts. Our 'Core' games team supports internal and external studios worldwide in creating, developing and launching new hit games, whilst our 'Live' games team focuses on delivering higher engagement on our existing and successful games.
   

  

 Joining our Live games team means collaborating with gaming industry experts on globally renowned, enduring games, while embracing exciting new entrepreneurial ventures. With over seven billion downloads worldwide and a portfolio of more than 10 resilient hybrid games generating more than $20m per year, we are the largest and most successful hybrid publisher in the world.
   

  

 Voodoo is creating a small experimentation team with a big mission: find the next best way to entertain the world by taking one of our best hits,
 **Flappy Dunk,** 
 to a new level.
   

  

 Role
   

  

 As a Game Lead, you will be the owner of your game and team. Your mission will be to define the right direction, build the team, and drive execution with speed, focus and ambition.
   

  

 During the first 6 months, your main focus will be on improving the core gameplay: making the game more satisfying, juicy, exciting and fun to play, before scaling the rest of the product.
   

  

**You Will**
* Build and lead your own small team, starting with around 4 people
* Set clear goals and make sure the team reaches them
* Lead, inspire and motivate the people working on the game
* Focus first on improving core gameplay, game feel, pacing and player satisfaction
* Identify what makes the game fun today and what could make it much stronger tomorrow
* Monitor and improve key game metrics such as retention, playtime, engagement and monetization
* Be involved and hands-on across all aspects of game development: game design, level design, UI/UX, tech, art and product decisions
* Continuously improve the internal process of game creation and iteration
* Manage your team’s performance and growth, keeping a high talent bar and helping strong people develop


 Profile
   

  

* 4 to 5+ years of experience in the gaming industry (Development, Product, Design, Art etc.)
* Mobile F2P market experiences (in Design ideally), track record with a successful mobile game
* A passion for mobile games and a strong understanding of core gameplay, game feel, player experience and iteration
* A proactive, ownership-driven mindset
* Strong leadership potential or previous team leadership experience
* A data-driven approach to decision-making
* The ability to move fast, test ideas, learn from results and iterate quickly
* Strong English communication skills and the ability to align different crafts around a clear direction


**Benefits**
* Best in Class compensation
* Other benefits according to the country you reside.
